title: carex × cenantha
intro: Carex × cenantha, also known as the hybrid sedge, is a unique plant species resulting from the cross between Carex aquatilis and Carex luzulina. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Carex × cenantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
